chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated Regarding the Circumambulation of the Uncircumcised

text: 2814 - رَوَى حَرِيزٌ وَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ عُمَرَ قَالاَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ تَطُوفَ اَلْمَرْأَةُ غَيْرَ مَخْفُوضَةٍ فَأَمَّا اَلرَّجُلُ فَلاَ يَطُوفُ إِلاَّ مَخْتُوناً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2814 - Hariz and Ibrahim ibn Umar narrated that Abu Abdullah (as) said:
"There is no harm if a woman performs tawaf without being circumcised. As for a man, he should not perform tawaf unless he is circumcised."
